query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN confidenceScore >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_quality,
  SUM(CASE WHEN confidenceScore >= 50 AND confidenceScore < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium_quality,
  SUM(CASE WHEN confidenceScore >= 30 AND confidenceScore < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low_quality,
  SUM(CASE WHEN confidenceScore < 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fallback,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM atis_card_understanding

  SUM(CASE WHEN confidenceScore >= 30 AND confidenceScore < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low_quality,
